visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene starts with a medium shot of a young man with brown hair, wearing a white oversized t-shirt and vertical blue-and-white striped pants. He is standing in a hallway with dark patterned wallpaper, facing a black door that features a white icon of a person changing a baby. A red rectangular overlay with white text is visible at the bottom. (2) The man turns towards the camera with an expressive, slightly surprised facial expression. He holds a black credit card between his fingers, gesturing with it as he speaks. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a shopping mall or department store interior. A white shoulder bag with a North Face logo is strapped across his chest. (3) The camera follows as he points to a white electronic payment terminal mounted on the wall next to the door. The terminal has a small digital screen displaying the number 10.00. He uses his right hand to highlight the payment requirement, emphasizing the interaction between the card and the reader. (4) He brings the black credit card close to the contactless payment symbol on the terminal. The device is housed in a white plastic shell with a logo for Glasmagasinet. Below the screen, symbols for various payment methods like Visa and Mastercard are visible. The man's hand is the central focus here. (5) The payment terminal screen updates with a green checkmark and Norwegian text. The man watches the screen closely, his facial expressions shifting from anticipation to confirmation. The background remains the same patterned wall. Yellow text appears briefly on the terminal's screen during the process. (6) Upon successful payment, a mechanical sound is heard, and the man reaches for the large silver handle of the black door. He pulls it open, revealing a brightly lit restroom interior with white brick-style tiles. He turns his head back toward the camera as he prepares to enter. (7) He walks into the restroom stall, which is spacious and clean. The walls are covered in white subway tiles with dark grout. To his right is a large black cylindrical trash bin, and to his left is a white toilet with a black toilet paper dispenser mounted on the wall. He looks around with wide eyes, seemingly impressed by the quality. (8) Standing next to the toilet, he points to the white toilet seat and then to the black dispenser containing toilet paper. He looks directly at the camera, smiling and giving a thumbs up. His body language is energetic and enthusiastic, concluding the demonstration of the paid restroom experience.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 上挪威百貨公司的廁所請刷卡30元. (2) [Logo]: Glasmagasinet. [Logo]: @yga0721.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator appearing throughout the video
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian male with short brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt, blue and white striped trousers, and a white crossbody bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a hallway with dark, geometric patterned wallpaper and a black door. It transitions to the interior of a modern, clean restroom with white subway-tiled walls and black accents.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with the sharp, mechanical sound of a door being pushed open. The background music, an upbeat and energetic electronic pop track with a fast tempo, is already playing at a moderate volume. There is a slight ambient hum characteristic of a public building. (2) A male voice enters, speaking Mandarin with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone and rapid speech rate. His vocal delivery is characterized by high arousal and positive valence, conveying excitement. The BGM maintains a steady, driving beat with synthetic textures and bright melodic elements. (3) A distinct, high-pitched electronic beep sounds from the payment terminal, indicating a successful card scan. The man continues to speak without pausing, his voice layered over the BGM. The sound design clearly highlights the interaction with the technology through this intentional SFX. (4) A female voice, presumably an automated recording from the payment machine, is heard saying Valkommen in a neutral, professional tone. This voice is slightly lower in volume than the main speaker but clearly audible over the music. The man responds with a short, excited exclamation. (5) A second electronic beep, identical to the first, signifies the completion of the transaction. The BGM remains consistent in its high energy. The main speaker's voice shows high pitch variability as he reacts to the machine's feedback, maintaining a high level of vocal tension. (6) The sound of a heavy door handle turning followed by a metallic click is heard. This is followed by the sound of footsteps on a hard surface as the man enters the restroom. The acoustic environment shifts slightly, gaining a more reflective, echoey quality due to the tiled walls. (7) The man's voice becomes more resonant as he speaks inside the restroom stall. He uses short, punchy sentences with frequent pauses for emphasis. The BGM continues until the end of the video, overlapping with his commentary. A final soft patting sound or thumb flick is heard as he gestures.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share a unique travel experience in Norway, specifically the requirement to pay by credit card to use a restroom in a department store. It informs the audience about local customs and the cost involved through an energetic and humorous presentation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses on-screen text and high-energy narration to explain a cultural difference. The production quality is typical of social media vlogs.
